---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] Brief description of the feature"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💭 Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to be added.

## 🎯 Motivation & Use Case
Why would this feature be useful? Describe the problem it solves or the value it adds.

Example:
- As a [user type], I want [feature] so that [benefit]
- This would be useful for [specific use case]

## 📝 Proposed Solution
How should this feature work? Describe your ideal implementation.

## 💻 Example Usage
Show how users would use this feature:

```python
# Example code demonstrating the feature
from model_utils import NewFeature

result = NewFeature.do_something(data)
print(result)
```

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions
Have you considered other approaches? Describe any alternatives.

## 📊 Additional Context
- [ ] Does this change affect model accuracy?
- [ ] Does this affect performance?
- [ ] Is this backward compatible?
- [ ] Related models or components affected?

## ✅ Benefits
- Benefit 1
- Benefit 2
- Benefit 3

## ⚠️ Potential Concerns
- Concern 1
- Concern 2

## 📚 Related Resources
- Link to related issue #123
- Link to research paper (if applicable)
- Link to external documentation

## ✔️ Checklist
- [ ] I've searched existing issues for similar requests
- [ ] I've provided a clear use case
- [ ] I've thought about backward compatibility
- [ ] I've considered performance implications
- [ ] I can contribute to implement this (optional)

---
**Thank you for the suggestion!** We appreciate your ideas for making MedEye better.
